headline: B of A Securities Maintains Neutral on Verisk Analytics, Lowers Price Target to $190
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Joshua Dennerlein   maintains Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $225 to $190.

headline: Verisk Can Re-Rate If AI Becomes A Tool, Not A Disruptor
summary: Verisk Analytics is a Buy as AI-driven fears have compressed its valuation despite resilient fundamentals and reaffirmed 2026 guidance. Read more on VRSK stock.

headline: The $67 Billion Power Grab That Changes the AI Narrative
summary: They're not talking about the future anymore. NextEra Energy bid $67 billion for a utility company on Monday because America needs electricity and it needs it right now.
